params.name: Dresden Green Diamond
params.description:
On Feb 14, 1743 AD, a collector purchased the Dresden Green Diamond.
The Dresden Green is currently the world's largest green diamond, weighing 40.7 carats. It was discovered near Golconda in southern India in the early 18th century. After being excavated, it changed hands several times and was finally collected in the Albertinium Museum.
